name: io.github.edinetdb/edinet-db-mcp
description: Remote MCP for Japan's EDINET DB — 3,800 listed companies' financials & filings (OAuth)

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.tools_summary: get_company / get_financials / get_analysis / search_companies / search_companies_batch / get_ranking / get_documentation / get_text_blocks / get_compensation_text / get_earnings / get_earnings_calendar / screen_companies / get_watchlist / add_to_watchlist / remove_from_watchlist / get_detailed_expenses / get_cross_shareholdings / get_directors / get_parent_company / get_related_party_transactions / get_main_customers / get_segments / get_text_blocks_structured / get_company_history / get_ir_documents
data_sources: gBizINFO (METI - Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry)
Corporate Number Publication Site (National Tax Agency)
